nasb.text: then we will give our daughters to you, and we will take your daughters for ourselves, and we will live with you and become one people.

esv.text: Then we will give our daughters to you, and we will take your daughters to ourselves, and we will dwell with you and become one people.

cnv.text: 我們就可以把女兒嫁給你們，也可以娶你們的女兒為妻；我們可以與你們同住，大家成為一族人。

ccb.text: 我们才能答应和你们通婚，共同生活，结成一个民族。

csbs.text: 这样，我们就把女儿们嫁给你们，也娶你们的女儿们，并与你们一起居住，成为一族。
